caption:
How we build a website in 48 hours (without cutting corners):

Step 1 — Brief call (30 min): we learn your business, your clients, your goals.
Step 2 — Design sprint (4–6 hrs): mobile-first design in Figma, exact colours, fonts, layout.
Step 3 — Build (12–16 hrs): Next.js code, performance-optimised, responsive on every screen.
Step 4 — Review + launch (2 hrs): you approve, we connect domain, go live.

No back-and-forth for weeks. No "still working on it." Just a live website by Wednesday if you brief us Monday.

This is the bienzoli process. It works. ⚡

→ bienzoli.com

#WebDevelopment #AgencyLife #48HourWebsite #Mauritius

templateData.headline: A website in 48 hours. Exactly how it works.
templateData.subhead: The bienzoli build process — no mystery, no delays.
templateData.step1Desc: 30 minutes. We learn your business, clients, goals, and brand preferences.
templateData.step2Desc: Mobile-first layout in Figma. Colours, fonts, sections — approved by you before we code.
templateData.step3Desc: Next.js code, performance-optimised, fully responsive on all screen sizes.
templateData.step4Desc: You approve, we connect domain, DNS propagates, site is live.
